title: Ender Gui
description: This texture pack changes hearts to ender eyes and food to Chorus Fruit.
body:
## Description

**Ender Gui** - In this texture pack, hearts are replaced with ender eyes and food is replaced with Chorus Fruit. The texture pack also has a hardcore version, well, you'll see for yourself.
- - - -
![Alt text](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/WandererEdges/Modrinth/main/nFESfBi.png)
You don't necessarily need OptiFine you can also play it in the vanilla version.
- - - -
